channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TADB Supports Women and Smallholder Farmers with Climate Funding
item.description: Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB) is stepping up efforts to empower women and smallholder farmers by offering targeted financing aimed at supporting climate-friendly agricultural practices...

item.title: Tanzanite Queens Make History by Qualifying for FIFA U-20 Women’s World Cup
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has joined all Tanzanians in celebrating the Tanzania women’s under-20 football team, the Tanzanite Queens, after they made history by qualifying for the 2026 FIFA U-20 W...

item.title: Orlando Pirates likely to clinch league title at FNB or Mbombela Stadium
item.description: Orlando Pirates are poised to secure the PSL championship in their final league match of the season against relegation-threatened Orbit College. Originally scheduled to be played at Rustenburg’s Royal...

item.title: Dangote, Niger State join hands to grow rice production and create jobs
item.description: Dangote Industries Limited don enter partnership with Niger State Government to fast-track industrialisation and bring more economic opportunities enter the state. According to Anthony Chiejina, Dango...

item.title: UK authorities confiscate assets from former FBI fugitive James 'Whitey' Bulger
item.description: UK authorities have reportedly seized a significant amount of money from the estate or assets linked to James 'Whitey' Bulger, the notorious American gangster who was once listed among the FBI's most-...

item.title: How to Play Globle and Today’s Answer Explained
item.description: Globle is a geography-based word game similar to Wordle, in which players try to guess the country selected for the day. Unlike Wordle, Globle offers unlimited guesses, allowing players to experiment ...

item.title: TRA Promotes Modern Customs Systems to Improve Tax Collection and Border Security
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) Commissioner General, Mr Yusuph Mwenda, has emphasized the importance of investing in modern customs systems and technology to curb tax evasion and smuggling. Spea...

item.title: Lawmaker urges opposition parties to unite and focus on national issues
item.description: Ikenga Ugochinyere, wey dey represent Ideato North and South Federal Constituency for Imo State for House of Representatives, don call on opposition parties like African Democratic Congress, Nigeria D...

item.title: Orca Energy Sells Songo Songo Gas Field Operations to Tanzanian Consortium for Nominal USD 10
item.description: Orca Energy Group has agreed to sell its entire Tanzanian gas business, including the important Songo Songo gas field, to a Tanzanian-led consortium made up of Taifa Gas Tanzania Limited and Amber Ene...

item.title: Controversy Surrounding Israel’s Participation in Eurovision 2026
item.description: The 2026 Eurovision Song Contest, set to be held in Vienna, is facing considerable controversy due to Israel's participation. Several nations, including Spain, which is one of the “Big Five” typically...

item.title: Princess of Wales Undertakes Her First Official International Visit Since 2022
item.description: The Princess of Wales has embarked on her first official foreign trip since 2022, marking an important moment in her public engagements. The journey highlights the continuation of royal duties abroad ...

item.title: Dr Alex George shares personal struggle with mental health and coping strategies
item.description: Dr Alex George, former Love Island contestant and mental health advocate, has opened up about a profoundly difficult period in his life, revealing that he came very close to taking his own life in 202...

item.title: Safa NEC members approach court to challenge suspensions

item.title: Exploring Mid-19th Century Fashion for Young Girls Through Vintage Portraits
item.description: Fashion for young girls in the mid-19th century reflected the values and aesthetics of the Victorian era, blending innocence with miniature versions of adult elegance. Portraits from this period showc...

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Compete for East Africa’s Major Oil Refinery Project
item.description: The competition to host East Africa’s potential largest oil refinery is becoming very serious, with Tanzania and Kenya both in the race. Nigerian billionaire Aliko Dangote has shown interest, and rece...

item.title: Key Developments Across Africa on May 13, 2026
item.description: On 13th May 2026, Uganda's President Yoweri Museveni was sworn in for a record seventh consecutive term following a contested January election, winning over 70% of the vote. Museveni urged citizens to...

item.title: OVP offers support to Albay families displaced by Mayon volcanic activity
item.description: The Office of the Vice President (OVP) has extended assistance to families in Albay who have been affected by the recent unrest caused by Mayon Volcano. As the volcano shows signs of increased activit...

item.title: DA prioritises accountability over shielding Ramaphosa amid Phala Phala controversy
item.description: DA leader Geordin Hill-Lewis has made it clear that the Democratic Alliance will not shield President Cyril Ramaphosa from scrutiny regarding the Phala Phala controversy. Despite calls from ANC leader...

item.title: Knowing Your Problems Isn’t Enough: Moving From Awareness to Action
item.description: These days, people in Dar es Salaam and beyond are speaking like psychologists in casual settings, dropping phrases about anxiety, attachment styles, and triggers like they are settled facts. But the ...

item.title: Saskatoon Delivery Drivers Strike Over Unsafe and Unfair Working Conditions
item.description: Dozens of delivery drivers contracted by Dragonfly in Saskatoon have initiated a strike, highlighting unsafe and inequitable working conditions. The drivers, responsible for delivering packages for co...
